description: Dashboard for reviewing DMARC reports stored in PostgreSQL via parsedmarc

options.content:
# DMARC Reports — PostgreSQL

This dashboard visualises DMARC aggregate and forensic report data stored in PostgreSQL by **parsedmarc**.

Use the **From Domain** dropdown above to filter by the domain in the `From:` header.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN r.spf_aligned THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.spf_aligned
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC

SELECT
  CASE WHEN r.dkim_aligned THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.dkim_aligned
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC

SELECT
  COALESCE(r.disposition, 'unknown') AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.disposition
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(rpt.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  COALESCE(spf.result, 'none') AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS value
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
LEFT JOIN dmarc_aggregate_record_spf spf ON spf.record_id = r.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY time, spf.result
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(rpt.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  COALESCE(dkim.result, 'none') AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS value
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
LEFT JOIN dmarc_aggregate_record_dkim dkim ON dkim.record_id = r.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY time, dkim.result
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(rpt.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  CASE WHEN r.dmarc_passed THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS value
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY time, r.dmarc_passed
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(rpt.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  COALESCE(r.disposition, 'unknown') AS metric,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS value
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY time, r.disposition
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(rpt.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  SUM(r.message_count) AS value
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  COALESCE(r.source_base_domain, 'unknown') AS "Source Domain",
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.source_base_domain
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  rpt.org_name AS "Organization",
  COALESCE(rpt.org_extra_contact_info, '') AS "Contact",
  COUNT(DISTINCT rpt.id) AS "Reports"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_report rpt
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
GROUP BY rpt.org_name, rpt.org_extra_contact_info
ORDER BY "Reports" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  COALESCE(r.header_from, 'unknown') AS "From Domain",
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.header_from
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  COALESCE(r.source_country, 'unknown') AS "Country",
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.source_country
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  r.source_ip_address::TEXT AS "Source IP",
  COALESCE(r.source_reverse_dns, '') AS "Reverse DNS",
  COALESCE(r.source_base_domain, '') AS "Source Domain",
  COALESCE(r.source_country, '') AS "Country",
  SUM(r.message_count) AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
GROUP BY r.source_ip_address, r.source_reverse_dns, r.source_base_domain, r.source_country
ORDER BY "Messages" DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT
  rpt.org_name AS "Organization",
  r.source_ip_address::TEXT AS "Source IP",
  COALESCE(r.source_reverse_dns, '') AS "Reverse DNS",
  COALESCE(r.source_base_domain, '') AS "Source Domain",
  COALESCE(r.source_country, '') AS "Country",
  COALESCE(r.header_from, '') AS "From",
  COALESCE(r.envelope_from, '') AS "Envelope From",
  COALESCE(r.disposition, '') AS "Disposition",
  CASE WHEN r.dkim_aligned THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "DKIM Aligned",
  CASE WHEN r.spf_aligned THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "SPF Aligned",
  CASE WHEN r.dmarc_passed THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "DMARC Passed",
  (
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT dkim.result, ', ')
    FROM dmarc_aggregate_record_dkim dkim
    WHERE dkim.record_id = r.id
  ) AS "DKIM Result",
  (
    SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT spf.result, ', ')
    FROM dmarc_aggregate_record_spf spf
    WHERE spf.record_id = r.id
  ) AS "SPF Result",
  r.message_count AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
ORDER BY r.message_count DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  rpt.domain AS "Domain",
  COALESCE(rpt.policy, '') AS "Policy (p)",
  COALESCE(rpt.subdomain_policy, '') AS "Subdomain Policy (sp)",
  COALESCE(rpt.adkim, '') AS "DKIM Alignment (adkim)",
  COALESCE(rpt.aspf, '') AS "SPF Alignment (aspf)",
  COALESCE(rpt.pct, '') AS "Percentage (pct)",
  COALESCE(rpt.fo, '') AS "Failure Options (fo)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Reports"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_report rpt
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
GROUP BY rpt.domain, rpt.policy, rpt.subdomain_policy, rpt.adkim, rpt.aspf, rpt.pct, rpt.fo
ORDER BY "Reports" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  COALESCE(r.header_from, '') AS "From",
  COALESCE(r.envelope_from, '') AS "Envelope From",
  COALESCE(r.source_base_domain, '') AS "Source Domain",
  CASE WHEN r.spf_aligned THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "SPF Aligned",
  COALESCE(spf.domain, '') AS "SPF Domain",
  COALESCE(spf.scope, '') AS "SPF Scope",
  COALESCE(spf.result, '') AS "SPF Result",
  r.message_count AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
LEFT JOIN dmarc_aggregate_record_spf spf ON spf.record_id = r.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
ORDER BY r.message_count DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  COALESCE(r.header_from, '') AS "From",
  COALESCE(r.source_base_domain, '') AS "Source Domain",
  CASE WHEN r.dkim_aligned THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "DKIM Aligned",
  COALESCE(dkim.domain, '') AS "DKIM Domain",
  COALESCE(dkim.selector, '') AS "DKIM Selector",
  COALESCE(dkim.result, '') AS "DKIM Result",
  r.message_count AS "Messages"
FROM dmarc_aggregate_record r
JOIN dmarc_aggregate_report rpt ON rpt.id = r.report_id
LEFT JOIN dmarc_aggregate_record_dkim dkim ON dkim.record_id = r.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(rpt.begin_date)
  AND r.header_from IN ($fromdomain)
ORDER BY r.message_count DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  f.arrival_date_utc AS "Arrival Date",
  COALESCE(f.feedback_type, '') AS "Feedback Type",
  COALESCE(f.reported_domain, '') AS "Reported Domain",
  f.source_ip_address::TEXT AS "Source IP",
  COALESCE(f.source_reverse_dns, '') AS "Reverse DNS",
  COALESCE(f.source_base_domain, '') AS "Source Domain",
  COALESCE(f.source_country, '') AS "Country",
  COALESCE(array_to_string(f.auth_failure, ', '), '') AS "Auth Failure",
  COALESCE(f.authentication_results, '') AS "Auth Results",
  COALESCE(f.delivery_result, '') AS "Delivery Result",
  COALESCE(f.dkim_domain, '') AS "DKIM Domain",
  COALESCE(f.sample_subject, '') AS "Subject",
  COALESCE(f.original_mail_from, '') AS "Mail From",
  COALESCE(f.original_rcpt_to, '') AS "Rcpt To"
FROM dmarc_forensic_report f
ORDER BY f.id DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  COALESCE(f.source_country, 'unknown') AS "Country",
  COUNT(*) AS "Reports"
FROM dmarc_forensic_report f
GROUP BY f.source_country
ORDER BY "Reports" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  COALESCE(f.source_base_domain, 'unknown') AS "Source Domain",
  COALESCE(f.source_country, '') AS "Country",
  f.source_ip_address::TEXT AS "Source IP",
  COALESCE(f.source_reverse_dns, '') AS "Reverse DNS",
  COUNT(*) AS "Reports"
FROM dmarc_forensic_report f
GROUP BY f.source_base_domain, f.source_country, f.source_ip_address, f.source_reverse_dns
ORDER BY "Reports" DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(tr.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  'Successful' AS metric,
  SUM(p.successful_session_count) AS value
FROM smtp_tls_report tr
JOIN smtp_tls_policy p ON p.report_id = tr.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tr.begin_date)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(tr.begin_date, $__interval) AS time,
  'Failed' AS metric,
  SUM(p.failed_session_count) AS value
FROM smtp_tls_report tr
JOIN smtp_tls_policy p ON p.report_id = tr.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tr.begin_date)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  'Successful' AS metric,
  SUM(p.successful_session_count) AS "Sessions"
FROM smtp_tls_report tr
JOIN smtp_tls_policy p ON p.report_id = tr.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tr.begin_date)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Failed' AS metric,
  SUM(p.failed_session_count) AS "Sessions"
FROM smtp_tls_report tr
JOIN smtp_tls_policy p ON p.report_id = tr.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tr.begin_date)

SELECT
  tr.organization_name AS "Organization",
  tr.begin_date AS "Begin",
  tr.end_date AS "End",
  COALESCE(p.policy_domain, '') AS "Policy Domain",
  COALESCE(p.policy_type, '') AS "Policy Type",
  COALESCE(array_to_string(p.policy_strings, ', '), '') AS "Policy Strings",
  COALESCE(p.successful_session_count, 0) AS "Successful Sessions",
  COALESCE(p.failed_session_count, 0) AS "Failed Sessions"
FROM smtp_tls_report tr
JOIN smtp_tls_policy p ON p.report_id = tr.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tr.begin_date)
ORDER BY p.failed_session_count DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  tr.organization_name AS "Organization",
  COALESCE(p.policy_domain, '') AS "Policy Domain",
  COALESCE(p.policy_type, '') AS "Policy Type",
  COALESCE(fd.result_type, '') AS "Result Type",
  fd.sending_mta_ip::TEXT AS "Sending MTA IP",
  fd.receiving_ip::TEXT AS "Receiving IP",
  COALESCE(fd.receiving_mx_hostname, '') AS "Receiving MX",
  COALESCE(fd.failure_reason_code, '') AS "Failure Reason",
  COALESCE(fd.additional_info_uri, '') AS "Additional Info",
  COALESCE(fd.failed_session_count, 0) AS "Failed Sessions"
FROM smtp_tls_failure_detail fd
JOIN smtp_tls_policy p ON p.id = fd.policy_id
JOIN smtp_tls_report tr ON tr.id = p.report_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tr.begin_date)
ORDER BY fd.failed_session_count DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT header_from FROM dmarc_aggregate_record WHERE header_from IS NOT NULL ORDER BY header_from
list.description: Filter by the domain in the From header
list.label: From Domain
list.name: fromdomain
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT header_from FROM dmarc_aggregate_record WHERE header_from IS NOT NULL ORDER BY header_from

title: DMARC Reports — PostgreSQL
